resources.string: Eyes burst. Blood boils. Jaws tear.
EYES BURST RED. BLOOD BOILS. TEETH KEEP BITING.

No thought. No pause. The throat ruptures and still roars. Chains weld the blade to the wrist. Blood steams in a red mist. An arm is gone. The body does not care. It lunges. It bites. It tastes iron. Reason was a cage. Rage is the key. Break it. Strike. Cleave. Tear.
NO THOUGHT. NO PAUSE. ROAR. AXE CHAINED TO WRIST. BLOOD STEAMS RED. ARM GONE. BODY DOES NOT CARE. BITE. SPLIT. TEAR.
Iron tastes sweet. The rusted chain sings.
IRON TASTES SWEET. CHAIN SINGS WITH SWING.

Voice boxes snap from the roar. The sound does not stop. A heavy blade is welded to the wrist. It stays even in death. Skin burns. Blood turns to mist. To think is to hesitate. To hesitate is to die. The cage of sanity shatters. Only rage remains. Destroy. Annihilate. Break them all.
VOCAL CORDS SNAP. SOUND DOES NOT STOP. BLADE WELDED TO WRIST. BLOOD TURNS TO MIST. SANITY SHATTERS. PURE RAGE BURNS. DESTROY. ANNIHILATE. BREAK THEM ALL.
